testCases.title: Verify navigation to the Lessons page
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/lessons/'

testCases.title: Verify navigation to the FAQ page
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/faq/'

testCases.title: Verify navigation to the Login page
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/login/'

testCases.title: Verify searching for a hockey team
steps: Verification: Expect search results to be displayed

testCases.title: Verify navigation to page 2 of the hockey teams list
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/pages/forms/?page_num=2'
expected: Page 2 of hockey teams list is displayed

testCases.title: Verify navigation to the next page of hockey teams list
steps: Verification: Expect URL to change to '/pages/forms/?page_num=20'
expected: Next page of hockey teams list is displayed
